summary: The diff addresses all three requirements (REQ-13, REQ-14, REQ-15) with meaningful changes. REQ-13 is addressed via auto-redirect logic in App.tsx after login and profile completion. REQ-14 is addressed via the reworked ProfileSetupModal with interactive card buttons. REQ-15 is addressed via fixes to broken imports, ProtectedRoute initialization handling, and actor-ready guards. However, one critical REQ-14 acceptance criterion is not met: the Organizer role selection does not map to a distinct backend role — the diff shows both Attendee and Organizer map to UserRole.user, meaning organizer role is not persisted to the backend correctly.

missing_requirements.requirement: Submitting the form saves the correct chosen role to the backend profile. After saving with the 'Organizer' role, the user has access to the Organizer Dashboard.
missing_requirements.reason: In ProfileSetupModal.tsx, the handleSubmit function always passes role: UserRole.user regardless of the selectedRole state. The organizer role is never saved to the backend. The file summary also confirms 'both mapping to UserRole.user'. This means a user who selects Organizer will be saved as a standard user, breaking organizer dashboard access.
